tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "Ubuntu-192.168.1.3"
 set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall shaper traffic-shaper
edit "ICMP_LIMIT"
 set guaranteed-bandwidth 0
 set maximum-bandwidth 64
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
 set protocol ICMP
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
 set name "limit_icmp_ubuntu"
 set srcintf "port2"
 set dstintf "port1"
 set srcaddr "Ubuntu-192.168.1.3"
 set dstaddr "all"
 set action accept
 set schedule "always"
 set service "ICMP"
 set traffic-shaper "ICMP_LIMIT"
 set nat disable
next
end

show firewall address "Ubuntu-192.168.1.3"
show firewall shaper
show firewall policy | grep ICMP
"}
